reason: Token catalog (--space-*, --text-*, --radius-*, --touch-min, --hairline, iOS tokens) and the mobile-adaptation rule. Desktop port must consume existing tokens; the rule about mobile-only @media blocks is exactly what this task is partially inverting — promotions out of the MQ need an explicit changelog comment.
Class naming + tier conventions for cards, buttons, pills, form rows. The .ios-form-* family must align with these conventions when promoted to desktop.
Light/dark parity, 44pt tap targets on touch-coarse pointers, version-bump rule. Step 1 bumps CURRENT_VERSION to 2.5.0; Step 4 honors the touch-coarse 44px rule explicitly.
Source-of-truth for the mobile patterns being ported. Preserves intent, not just CSS, during the desktop adaptation.
